title: Price Distribution
description: Shows the number of daily closes in between each price range

title: Market Cap Distribution
description: Shows the number of daily closes in between each market cap range

title: Price On This Day
description: Shows Bitcoin’s price on this calendar day across all years of BTCUSD exchange rate history.

title: Days Since All-Time High
description: Shows the number of days since Bitcoin's last all-time high

title: Days at a Loss
description: Shows the number of days purchases made at each daily high were at a loss

title: Mined Supply & Price
description: Shows the mined supply and price, colored by the epoch

title: Epoch-Over-Epoch Growth
description: Shows the epoch-over-epoch growth based on block height

title: Halving Progress
description: Shows the relative halving progress based on block height through each epoch

title: Halving Cycles (Block-Height Aligned)
description: Compares all Bitcoin halving epochs by normalizing progress to block height and showing each epoch's performance multiple.

title: Halving Cycles (Days After Halving)
description: Compares all Bitcoin halving epochs by normalizing progress to days after the halving and showing each epoch's performance multiple.

title: Cycle Low Multiple (Days After Cycle Low)
description: Compares Bitcoin market cycles by aligning each one from its cycle low and showing the performance multiple to its market high.

title: Cycle High Drawdown (Days After Cycle High)
description: Compares Bitcoin market cycles by aligning each one from its cycle high and showing the percentage drawdown over time.

title: Mining Difficulty & Target Hash
description: A snapshot of Bitcoin’s mining difficulty, target hash, and related network stats at the latest block.

title: Target & Block Hashes
description: Shows every block hash as an orange dot and the difficulty targets in white

title: Issuance Rate
description: Shows Bitcoin's annualized issuance rate

title: Global Wealth
description: Shows the estimated total global wealth in terms of bitcoin

title: Price of Ground Beef
description: Shows the price of ground beef in terms of bitcoin and in terms of dollars

title: Price of Eggs
description: Shows the price of eggs in terms of bitcoin and in terms of dollars

title: Price of Steak
description: Shows the price of sirloin steak in terms of bitcoin and in terms of dollars

title: Price of Chicken
description: Shows the price of one whole chicken in terms of bitcoin and in terms of dollars

title: Price of New Houses
description: Shows the average sales price for new houses in terms of bitcoin and in terms of dollars

title: Price of Electricity
description: Shows the price of one kWh of electricity in terms of bitcoin and in terms of dollars

title: Price of Hourly Earnings
description: Shows the price of one hour of earnings in terms of bitcoin and in terms of dollars

title: Price of CA Min Wage
description: Shows the price of one hour of California minimum wage in terms of bitcoin and in terms of dollars

title: Price of Milk
description: Shows the price of milk in terms of bitcoin and in terms of dollars

title: Price of Rice
description: Shows the price of rice in terms of bitcoin and in terms of dollars

title: Price of Sugar
description: Shows the price of sugar in terms of bitcoin and in terms of dollars

title: Price of Unleaded Gasoline
description: Shows the price of unleaded gasoline in terms of bitcoin and in terms of dollars

title: Node Count
description: Shows each node count by software and version

title: Block Size
description: Shows each block size with smaller epoch windows on the side

title: UTXO Distributions
description: Shows the distributions of non-zero UTXOs, both by counts and by value

title: HODL Waves
description: Shows UTXO age distribution over time to visualize HODLing behavior

title: HODL Waves with Price
description: Shows UTXO age distribution over time to visualize HODLing behavior with the price overlayed

title: Supply Distribution & Age By Realized Price
description: Shows the prices and ages of the circulating bitcoin supply

title: CAGR
description: Shows the 4, 6, 8, 10, and 12 year compound annual growth rates

title: Bitcoin & Traditional Assets CAGR
description: Shows the 1-15 year compound annual growth rates for bitcoin and traditional assets

title: Daily DCA Cost Basis
description: Shows the cost basis of every daily dollar cost average starting point

title: Bitcoin vs Gold $50 Weekly DCA
description: Compares the returns of a $50 weekly DCA in bitcoin vs gold

title: 200 DMA & 200 WMA
description: Shows the 200 daily and the 200 weekly moving averages

title: Bitcoin Dominance
description: Shows Bitcoin's market cap compared to the top 9 shitcoins (excluding stablecoins)

title: Wholecoins (1 BTC)
description: Shows the history of Wholecoins (UTXOs worth exactly 1 BTC)

title: Pi-coins (3.14 BTC)
description: Shows the history of Pi-coins (UTXOs worth exactly 3.14 BTC or 3.14159265 BTC)

title: V-coins (5 BTC)
description: Shows the history of V-coins (UTXOs worth exactly 5 BTC)

title: X-coins (10 BTC)
description: Shows the history of X-coins (UTXOs worth exactly 10 BTC)

title: L-coins (50 BTC)
description: Shows the history of L-coins (UTXOs worth exactly 50 BTC)

title: C-coins (100 BTC)
description: Shows the history of C-coins (UTXOs worth exactly 100 BTC)

title: D-coins (500 BTC)
description: Shows the history of D-coins (UTXOs worth exactly 500 BTC)

title: M-coins (1,000 BTC)
description: Shows the history of M-coins (UTXOs worth exactly 1,000 BTC)

title: Monthly & Yearly Returns
description: Shows the last 5 years of monthly and yearly returns

title: Quarterly & Yearly Returns
description: Shows the quarterly and yearly returns

title: Never Look Back Price
description: Shows the running all-time-lows across Bitcoin’s full price history

title: Monthly Candles
description: Shows the monthly candles chart

title: Yearly Candles
description: Shows the yearly candles chart

title: Epoch Candles
description: Shows the epoch candles chart

title: Yearly Windows
description: Chart with 1 year, 2 year, 3 year, & 4 year windows
